extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters by direction and category: against the Corporation are 37 criminal, 63 tax, 1 statutory/regulatory and no material civil proceedings; against subsidiaries are nil criminal, 4 tax, nil statutory/regulatory and nil civil proceedings. I excluded all “By the Corporation” rows, including 226 criminal and 3 civil matters, and counted the 1 statutory/regulatory row despite the note that the Corporation is currently a petitioner in the appeal; promoter and director rows are nil. The quantified aggregate against the Corporation is ₹748,946.96 million, used as the stated against-amount total and converted to ₹74,894.696 crore; the subsidiary amount is USD 434,439 and cannot be converted to rupees from the provided text, so it is excluded from the rupee aggregate. The contingent-liabilities figure is the stated Total of ₹294,067.51 million as at December 31, 2021 on a standalone basis, converted to ₹29,406.751 crore. No company-wide top-five or top-ten customer concentration percentage is disclosed; the disclosed concentration percentages relate to states, products or other non-customer measures. Monetary litigation tables use ₹ million but also contain a subsidiary amount in USD, so the source unit is mixed; ₹ million was converted to crore by dividing by 10.
